name: Applied Love Labs
blurb: Host and fiscal sponsor. Charitable contributions flow through ALL / TILT; tax-deductible receipts are issued in ALL's name.

name: Supporting partner 1
blurb: Placeholder for a mission-aligned funder -- typically a research foundation, academic institute, or endowment. The committee will fill this slot once a commitment is signed. [PLACEHOLDER]

name: Supporting partner 2
blurb: Placeholder for a second mission-aligned funder or institutional partner. The committee will fill this slot once a commitment is signed. [PLACEHOLDER]

name: Community partner 1
blurb: Placeholder for a local Atlanta venue, university, or civic partner. The committee will fill this slot once arrangements are made. [PLACEHOLDER]

name: Community partner 2
blurb: Placeholder for an in-kind partner -- captioning, AV, catering, or similar. The committee will fill this slot once arrangements are made. [PLACEHOLDER]

name: Community partner 3
blurb: Placeholder for a media, publication, or community organization partner. The committee will fill this slot once arrangements are made. [PLACEHOLDER]
